boxName: Control unit located in the dashboard
boxDescription: The car fuses are grouped into four control units, located in the dashboard, on the positive pole of the battery, next to the battery itself, and on the left side of the trunk.

boxName: Engine compartment fuse box located next to the battery
boxDescription: To access the fuse holder unit and the individual fuse located next to the battery, it is necessary to handle the fastening hooks and remove the protective cover.

boxName: Fuse box on the positive terminal of the battery
boxDescription: To access the fuse box located on the battery terminal, release the fastening springs and remove the protective cover.
To access the fuse box located on the left side of the trunk.
